decisions.decision: Use real AssumptionProvider with Seeder pattern (matching AssumptionPanel.test.tsx) rather than mocking useAssumptions
Write comprehensive standalone tests even where they overlap with AssumptionPanel.test.tsx, since this tests AssumptionBar in isolation
alternatives_rejected: Only test behaviors not covered by AssumptionPanel.test.tsx

decisions.decision: Test structural DOM output (element presence, text content, aria-labels, flex layout) rather than exact CSS color values
alternatives_rejected: Assert exact inline style color/spacing values

steps.task: Create frontend/src/__tests__/AssumptionBar.test.tsx with test setup: imports, Seeder helper component, local AssumptionProvider wrapper using renderWithProviders from helpers.tsx
Write test: renders assumption text in 'label = outcomeId' format for each assumption
Write test: renders GIVEN: label when assumptions are present
Write test: bar is hidden (not rendered) when there are no assumptions
Write test: remove button click removes individual assumption (verify aria-label 'Remove assumption {label}')
Write test: Clear all button removes all assumptions
Write test: multiple assumptions render as separate tags
Write test: structural styling - bar container uses flex layout, tags have expected structure
Run vitest on AssumptionBar.test.tsx to verify all tests pass
